LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT STANFORD ASSET GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT. RULING: DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NOVAK, THE TRUSTEE OF THE BALBOA STREET TRUST, MAY NOT REPRESENT THE TRUST IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. ZIEGLER V. NICKEL (1998) 64 CAL.APP.4TH 545. IF THE TRUST IS TO REMAIN A CROSS-COMPLAINANT, AN ATTORNEY MUST REPRESENT IT. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS MUST ALSO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.112 WHICH REQUIRES SPECIFYING THE PARTY OR PARTIES ASSERTING A CAUSE OF ACTION AND THE PARTY OR PARTIES AGAINST WHOM A CAUSE OF ACTION IS DIRECTED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797 *** RULING VACATED PER MINUTE ORDER FILED DEC-11-2009. MOTION RE-SET IN DEPT. 301 ***

Notice Of Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANT STANFORD ASSET GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint.
APPEARANCES: Edward Novak, deft/x-complainant & opposing party in propria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NOVAK, THE TRUSTEE OF THE BALBOA STREET TRUST, MAY NOT REPRESENT THE TRUST IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. ZIEGLER V. NICKEL (1998) 64 CAL.APP.4TH 545. IF THE TRUST IS TO REMAIN A CROSS-COMPLAINANT, AN ATTORNEY MUST REPRESENT IT. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS MUST ALSO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 2.112 WHICH REQUIRES SPECIFYING THE PARTY OR PARTIES ASSERTING A CAUSE OF ACTION AND THE PARTY OR PARTIES AGAINST WHOM A CAUSE OF ACTION IS DIRECTED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
